_comment: Fill this in once per offer+campaign. Then run: npm run pipeline

offer.name: Talent As A Service - Engineering Teams
offer.targetCustomer: US-based SaaS companies and tech consultancies with 50-500 employees that are scaling engineering teams
offer.customerProblem: They have open engineering roles sitting unfilled for 3-4+ months, causing delivery delays and missed roadmap targets
offer.whyNow: Post-2023 hiring freeze lift — companies are aggressively hiring again but talent market is tight and expensive
offer.customerAlternative: Post on LinkedIn/Indeed, use a Big 4 recruiter, or hire a full-time internal recruiter
offer.observableSuccess: Roles filled in 3-4 weeks, not 3-4 months. Engineers onboarded and delivering within 30 days
offer.valueProp: We place pre-vetted LATAM engineers into US tech teams in 3-4 weeks — faster, cheaper, same timezone alignment
offer.differentiators: Pre-vetted talent pool (not reactive searches), LATAM timezone overlap, English-fluent, pod model available, no placement fees until hired
offer.salesModel: Intro call → candidate shortlist in 5 days → interviews → hire. Monthly retainer or success fee
offer.objectionHandlers: We've placed X engineers in the last 90 days. LATAM engineers work US hours. English fluency tested. 90-day guarantee
offer.goToMarket: Signal-driven outbound via Apollo — target companies actively posting engineering jobs
offer.pricingPackaging: Success fee: 15% of first-year salary. Retainer: $2,500/month for dedicated sourcing
offer.successStories: Placed 3 data engineers at [SaaS Co] in 18 days. Placed ML team of 4 at [Consulting Firm] within 30 days

campaign.name: Hiring 3 Engineering Roles - Delivery Pressure
campaign.signalType: Active job postings for engineering roles
campaign.signalHypothesis: Companies posting 2+ engineering roles are under delivery pressure and receptive to staffing solutions
campaign.detectionMethod: Apollo.io company search with engineering role keywords
campaign.companyFilters: Series A+, 50-1000 employees, SaaS or tech consulting
campaign.buyerFilters: CTO, VP Engineering, Director of Engineering, Founder
